steps.title: Read two useful points
steps.content: The graph shows candy bars wrapped after $x$ seconds. Use two clear points on the line: $(0,0)$ and $(2,80)$. That means the machine wraps $80$ candy bars in $2$ seconds.

steps.title: Convert to a per-second rate
steps.content: The rate is the slope of the line: $$\frac{80-0}{2-0}=\frac{80}{2}=40.$$ So the machine wraps $40$ candy bars per second.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B is $40$, so choice B is correct.
